title: Ikan Bakar
description: a popular Indonesian and Malaysian dish of charcoal-grilled fish or seafood, marinated in spices and frequently covered in banana leaf

title: Shellout
description: Shellout is a popular Malaysian dining concept featuring a 'cutlery-free' seafood feast poured directly onto a plastic-lined table, encouraging hands-on eating

title: Satay
description: Satay is a popular Southeast Asian dish consisting of small, seasoned pieces of meat (commonly chicken, beef, or mutton) threaded onto skewers and grilled over a charcoal fire.
